description: State document, fiscal register. Mentions several amounts in dīnār. Reused for Hebrew Piyyut. (Compare AIU IV.C.453, T-S NS 243.75a, T-S NS 198.61, BL OR 5566B.3, ENA 2886.1–7, T-S NS 71.64, T-S 8H22.18, T-S NS 308.41, and possibly T-S Misc.24.106).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
